name: Stripe MCP
description: Full Stripe API access — payments, invoices, subscriptions, and customer management for AI agents.
longDescription:
The Stripe MCP server provides comprehensive access to the Stripe API, enabling AI agents to process payments, create and manage subscriptions, generate invoices, handle refunds, and manage customer data. Built for production use with proper error handling, idempotency support, and PCI compliance considerations.

## Key Capabilities
- Create and process payments (one-time and recurring)
- Manage subscriptions and billing cycles
- Generate and send invoices
- Handle refunds and disputes
- Customer CRUD operations
- Webhook event processing
- Connect account management

## Security
- API keys are never exposed to the AI model
- All operations use scoped permissions
- PCI-compliant data handling

name: Shopify MCP
description: Manage your Shopify store — products, orders, inventory, and customers through AI agents.
longDescription:
The Shopify MCP server connects your AI agents to Shopify's Admin API, enabling full store management capabilities. Create products, process orders, track inventory, manage customers, and handle fulfillment — all through natural language commands.

## Key Capabilities
- Product CRUD with variants and images
- Order management and fulfillment
- Inventory tracking across locations
- Customer management and segmentation
- Discount and promotion creation
- Analytics and reporting

name: PayPal MCP
description: PayPal checkout, invoicing, and payment processing for AI-powered workflows.
longDescription:
Integrate PayPal payment processing into your AI agent workflows. Handle checkouts, send invoices, process refunds, and manage disputes — all through the MCP protocol.

## Key Capabilities
- Create and capture payments
- Send professional invoices
- Process refunds
- Manage disputes and chargebacks
- Payout to sellers and partners

name: Square MCP
description: Square payments, POS integration, and business management tools for AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents to Square's ecosystem for payment processing, point-of-sale operations, inventory management, and customer engagement.

## Key Capabilities
- Process in-person and online payments
- Manage catalog and inventory
- Customer directory and loyalty programs
- Team management
- Reporting and analytics

name: Slack MCP
description: Send messages, manage channels, and automate Slack workflows from your AI agents.
longDescription:
The Slack MCP server gives your AI agents full access to Slack workspaces. Post messages, create channels, manage users, set up automated workflows, and react to events in real-time.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and read messages in channels and DMs
- Create and manage channels
- User and group management
- File uploads and sharing
- Workflow builder integration
- Slash command handling
- Event subscription and real-time updates

name: Gmail MCP
description: Read, compose, send, and manage email through Gmail — AI-powered email automation.
longDescription:
Give your AI agents the ability to manage email through Gmail. Read incoming messages, compose and send emails, manage labels, search through mail, and handle attachments.

## Key Capabilities
- Read and search emails
- Compose and send messages
- Reply and forward
- Label and organize
- Attachment handling
- Draft management
- Thread operations

envVars.name: GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH
envVars.description: Path to Google OAuth credentials JSON

name: Discord MCP
description: Manage Discord servers, send messages, moderate communities, and automate bot actions.
longDescription:
The Discord MCP server enables AI agents to interact with Discord servers. Send messages, manage channels, moderate users, create events, and build automated community management workflows.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and manage messages
- Channel and category management
- User moderation (kick, ban, timeout)
- Role management
- Event creation
- Voice channel operations

name: Twilio MCP
description: SMS, voice calls, WhatsApp messaging, and communication APIs for AI agents.
longDescription:
Integrate Twilio's communication platform with your AI agents. Send SMS messages, make voice calls, connect via WhatsApp, and manage phone numbers.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and receive SMS
- Make and manage voice calls

- Phone number management

name: SendGrid MCP
description: Transactional and marketing email at scale — templates, campaigns, and deliverability.

Send transactional emails, manage marketing campaigns, handle email templates, and track deliverability through AI agents connected to SendGrid.

## Key Capabilities

name: Email SMTP MCP
description: Send emails via any SMTP server — Gmail, Outlook, custom mail servers, and more.
longDescription:
A universal email MCP server that works with any SMTP provider. Send emails through Gmail, Outlook, Amazon SES, or your own mail server.

## Key Capabilities
- Send emails via SMTP
- HTML and plain text support
- Attachment handling
- Multiple recipient types (to, cc, bcc)
- Template rendering
- Connection pooling

name: PostgreSQL MCP
description: Query, manage, and automate PostgreSQL databases with natural language through AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents directly to PostgreSQL databases. Execute queries, manage schemas, handle migrations, monitor performance, and automate database operations.

## Key Capabilities
- Execute SQL queries (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Schema management and migrations
- Table and index operations
- Performance monitoring and query optimization
- Backup and restore operations
- Connection pool management

## Security
- Read-only mode available
- Query parameterization to prevent injection
- Role-based access control

name: Supabase MCP
description: Full Supabase backend access — database, auth, storage, and edge functions from AI agents.
longDescription:
The Supabase MCP server provides complete access to Supabase projects. Manage your database, handle authentication, upload files to storage, and invoke edge functions.

## Key Capabilities

- Authentication management

description: Document database operations — CRUD, aggregation, indexing for MongoDB through AI agents.

## Key Capabilities

- Schema management

name: Docker MCP
description: Container management — build, run, stop, and orchestrate Docker containers from AI agents.

name: Filesystem MCP
description: Read, write, and manage local files and directories — essential for any AI coding workflow.
longDescription:
The Filesystem MCP server gives your AI agent safe, controlled access to your local filesystem. Read and write files, create directories, search for files, and manage project structures.

## Key Capabilities
- Read and write files
- Create and delete directories
- Move and copy files
- Search files by pattern
- Get file metadata
- Directory tree listing

## Security
- Configurable allowed directories
- No access outside allowed paths

name: Playwright MCP
description: Browser automation and testing — navigate pages, fill forms, take screenshots, and run E2E tests.

## Key Capabilities

- Form filling and submission

- Element selection and clicking
- Multi-browser support (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
- Network interception

name: Context7 MCP
description: Up-to-date library documentation — resolve packages, query docs, and get real code examples.
longDescription:
Context7 gives your AI agent access to current, verified library documentation instead of hallucinated APIs. Resolve library IDs, query documentation, and get real code examples.

## Key Capabilities
- Resolve package names to library IDs
- Query up-to-date documentation
- Get real code examples
- Version-specific docs
- Multiple language support
- Ranked by relevance

name: Sequential Thinking MCP
description: Structured reasoning — break down complex problems step by step with revision and branching.
longDescription:
A thinking tool for AI agents that enables structured, multi-step reasoning. Break down problems, revise previous thoughts, branch into alternative approaches, and verify solutions.

## Key Capabilities
- Step-by-step problem decomposition
- Thought revision and correction
- Branch exploration
- Hypothesis generation and verification
- Adjustable depth

name: Memory MCP

## Key Capabilities

- Build relationships between entities

name: Fetch MCP
